text:
Fullmetal Alchemist Wiki is a free reference website for everything related to Fullmetal Alchemist (manga, anime, video games, movies, etc.). It is open for editing by everyone at any time, by clicking the Edit this page link on top of every article, making it easy for informed fans to contribute their knowledge to the Wiki.
Warning:The Wiki contains spoilers, read at your own risk.
Second warning:The Wiki is not for fan material, so please don't post any.
Third Warning :Vandalism, spam, and inserting unrelated info will not be tolerated. Such conduct will result disciplinary action, from warnings to a temporary or permanent ban, depending on the nature and number of the wrongdoings.
